ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "upc" TEXT /* UPC number of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status history */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
